YouTube is expanding its AI deepfake detection tool to all adult users
items.description: YouTube is expanding its AI likeness detection program to all users over the age of 18 - meaning just about anyone can have the platform hunt for potential deepfakes of themselves. The likeness detection feature uses a selfie-style scan of a person's face to monitor YouTube for lookalikes. If there ...

items.title: Windows 11 tests an adjustable taskbar and resizable Start menu
items.description: Microsoft's latest Windows 11 test will allow you to reposition the taskbar and change the size of the Start menu. items.title: ArXiv will ban researchers who upload papers full of AI slop
items.description: ArXiv, a popular platform for preprint academic research, is taking a new step to attempt to reduce the volume of papers that include AI slop. If a paper has "incontrovertible evidence that the authors did not check the results of LLM generation," such as hallucinated references or "meta-comments" l...

items.title: OpenAI keeps shuffling its executives in bid to win AI agent battle
items.description: OpenAI announced yet another reorganization Friday, consolidating certain areas and making company president Greg Brockman the official lead of all things product.
